subject: fix(theme): remove non-color CSS tokens from @variant blocks (Vercel build fix)
body:
Uniwind's @variant blocks only support --color-* CSS custom properties.
Non-color tokens (--radius-selector, --radius-field, --radius-box,
--border) caused a CssSyntaxError in Tailwind's @theme processing
during Vercel production build:

  SyntaxError: Missing closing } at @theme

The design tokens are still available via THEME_TOKENS in
lib/themeColors.ts, accessed through useTheme().tokens in components.
CSS variables were redundant since all token usage is through JS
inline styles, not CSS utility classes.

Tags: theme, bugfix, build, vercel
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 5
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
